_comment: Per-Digimon attack identity (US-070/US-074). moves = by id (top tier); lineDefaults = per evolution line; stageDefaults = per Stage.rawValue, the guaranteed floor covering every stage so all 1,022 roster Digimon resolve. US-074 authors an explicit moves entry for EVERY node in evolutions.json, so the line tier is now a safety net for nodes added later rather than a live path. Within a line no two Digimon share a projectileSymbol+tint pair, so two members of the same family never throw the same thing. Every *Symbol is an SF Symbol name; tint is a MoveTint case.
